$comment: Manifest for scripts/sync-docs.mjs — which repository documents render on the site (src/content/repo-docs/) and which are link-only. The repository copy is always canonical; rendered copies are mechanical, drift-gated transforms. Public-appropriateness rulings per the site-expansion design; master doc is LINK-ONLY this cycle (rendering it adds a drift surface while AM-22 re-pins its hash).

render.description: The first vertical slice: scope, wire-in points, flagship demo contract, and the M3 acceptance ladder.
render.title: RFC-001 — the first vertical slice

render.description: Implementation-ready engine mechanics: canonical state tables, append-only ledger, claim protocol, gate, recovery, sweep, and the conformance test plan.
render.title: RFC-002 — engine design

render.description: The IrrevonBench preregistration DRAFT: hypotheses, baseline ladder, metrics, analysis plan, sealed holdout, and the falsification criterion.
render.title: IrrevonBench preregistration (DRAFT)

render.description: Phases P0–P8, their gates, and the public-release gate. Order is load-bearing; nothing here is a date.
render.title: Execution plan — phases and gates

render.description: The CI workflow map: tiers, required checks, owner settings checklist, and local parity via make targets.
render.title: CI — how this repository builds

render.description: The development threat model and agent execution policy: what agents may do, what is human-only, and the enforcement layers.
render.title: Security policy — development process

render.description: The machine-readable contract map: five shipped JSON Schemas, their example suites, and what is deliberately deferred.
render.title: Schemas — machine-readable contracts

render.description: Apache-2.0 (ADR-0028): the grant, the NOTICE attribution, and what stays closed — contributions, trademarks, and release mechanics.
render.title: Licensing status

render.description: The append-only ADR index and policy. If a decision is not in the index, it has not been made.
render.title: Decision records — index and policy

linkOnly.reason: Hash-pinned canonical document; link-only this cycle by explicit ruling — the docs landing links it and names the pinned hash.
Human action queue: public in the repository but an internal working process, not a discovery document.
Package README; linked from the docs landing.
